title: Prediction Markets Gain Traction Despite Regulatory Uncertainty
summary: Financial institutions are increasingly embracing prediction markets despite ongoing legal battles over regulation.

title: Crypto Firms Blame AI for Downsizing

title: $25 Million Crypto Stablecoin Exploit
summary: Resolv Labs was compromised via stolen AWS keys, resulting in a $25 million loss from a crypto stablecoin.
charlotte_impact: Emphasizes the critical need for robust security measures in the crypto space.

title: Oil Price Surge and Wall Street's Response

title: Buffett Downplays Recent Market Selloff
